title: Is Taxing Waste a Waste of Time? Evidence from a Supreme Court Decision
authors: Stefano Carattini; Andrea Baranzini; Rafael Lalive

excluded_policy_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: pricing garbage by the bag (PGB) / pay-per-bag fee
excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Unit pricing on household waste volume (PGB), not a tax on carbon emissions or fossil/transport fuels.

inclusion_reason: The paper measures public perceptions and voting intentions for a waste-management pay-per-bag tax (PGB), with no direct analysis of carbon or fuel tax acceptability.
exclusion_reason: Acceptability/support is evaluated only for pricing garbage by the bag. Mentions of carbon taxes are purely background; no carbon/fuel tax instrument is empirically assessed.
